events.title: Iran says almost a dozen 'enemy projectiles' targeted Qeshm Island
events.desc: Iran announced that approximately a dozen 'enemy projectiles' targeted Qeshm Island, with subsequent explosions heard in Bandar Abbas. This incident highlights ongoing regional tensions and potential cross-border attacks.

events.title: Nine dead as Russia and Ukraine trade drone and missile salvos
events.desc: Russia and Ukraine engaged in a significant exchange of drone and missile attacks, resulting in nine fatalities. Ukraine's vulnerability to Russian ballistic missiles, particularly due to a shortage of Patriot munitions, is noted.

events.title: Israeli attacks in Gaza kill six people, including a girl, medics say
events.desc: Israeli attacks in the Gaza Strip resulted in the deaths of at least six people, including a child. Mediators are continuing talks to secure a U.S.-brokered ceasefire amid ongoing hostilities.

events.title: US and Iran trade strikes after tankers hit in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The US military reported striking missile sites and command centers in response to Iranian attacks. Iran claims to have targeted US bases. This exchange follows incidents involving tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, escalating tensions.

events.title: Headteacher among four killed in deadliest Israeli attack on Lebanon since latest ceasefire
events.desc: An Israeli attack in Lebanon resulted in the deaths of four people, including a headteacher and three women. This is reported as the deadliest Israeli attack on Lebanon since the implementation of the latest ceasefire.

events.title: Iraqi PM to meet US President Trump in Washington to deepen strategic ties
events.desc: The Prime Minister of Iraq is scheduled to meet with U.S. President Trump in Washington to strengthen strategic relations. The discussions are expected to include oil and gas deals and broader economic cooperation.

events.title: New Syrian parliament meets for first time in Damascus
events.desc: Syria's new parliament convened for its inaugural session in Damascus. This marks a political transition following the ousting of Bashar al-Assad, with the new body tasked with drafting a constitution.

events.title: Trump says Strait of Hormuz open to commercial traffic
events.desc: U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the Strait of Hormuz remains open for commercial traffic, despite ongoing exchanges of attacks between the U.S. and Iran that have raised concerns about maritime safety.

events.title: Syrian transitional parliament holds first session
events.desc: Syria's transitional parliament convened its first session, with the objective of drafting a new constitution and establishing democratic foundations. This development follows years of authoritarian rule.

events.title: Iraqi prime minister to visit Washington on Monday; oil and gas deals expected
events.desc: Iraq's prime minister will visit Washington to enhance strategic ties with the U.S., with expected outcomes including oil and gas deals and expanded economic cooperation. The visit occurs amidst ongoing U.S.-Iran military tensions.

events.title: US Democrat Ro Khanna says he was detained by armed Israeli settlers
events.desc: U.S. Representative Ro Khanna reported being detained for 90 minutes by armed Israeli settlers while visiting the occupied West Bank, highlighting tensions in the region.

events.title: Bomb explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
events.desc: Eighteen people were injured in Damascus by bomb explosions that occurred during the visit of French President Macron. State television reported the Syrian president welcomed Macron at the presidential palace amidst the incidents.

events.title: Iran expands attacks on Gulf states after US strikes, says Strait of Hormuz closed
events.desc: Following U.S. strikes, Iran targeted U.S. facilities in Gulf states and declared the Strait of Hormuz closed. This escalation marks an increase in the pace and range of retaliatory actions.

events.title: Iran's IRGC navy says Strait of Hormuz closed until further notice, state media reports
events.desc: Iran's Revolutionary Guards navy announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz until further notice, citing an incident involving a vessel transiting an unauthorized route. This action impacts crucial global shipping lanes.

events.title: US insists Strait of Hormuz is open as it exchanges strikes with Iran
events.desc: Despite Iran's announcement of closing the Strait of Hormuz and launching attacks, the U.S. military maintains that traffic continues to flow through the vital waterway. Both nations are engaged in reciprocal strikes.
